title: フィリーズレビューの後に・カワイイ夢

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reflecting on the race, Curren Chan decides
to give up on the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead, she changes her goal to becoming the
most beloved runner, believing it will help her
traverse the path to cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, we set the pinnacle of all sprints—the
Sprinters Stakes—as her next race. We also add
the Aoi Stakes as a way for her to get
reacclimated to sprints before that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's not all. Curren Chan also seems to be
cooking up some other plan outside of her races
and training.
